Id1.text: Batchoy is a food in the Philippines and one of its ingredient is shrimp.

Id2.text: The Philippines is the country of origin for the dish Batchoy, of which shrimp is one of the main ingredients.

Id3.text: The Philippines is the country that Batchoy, a dish containing shrimp, comes from.
